Silent Changes

Raw KV-field deltas between 7.35d → 7.36, parsed from data/stats/{ver}/heroes/*.txt. These may overlap with the official patchnotes — this is the source-of-truth view. Engine noise (FX, sounds, animation, particle resources) is filtered out.
